description: Style Notepolice Titanium Wings, for men, is available in a black flacon.Product DetailsPolice Titanium Wings is composed of citrusy-herbal accords enriched with woody notes. The composition lines scents of luminous citruses and juicy fruit, floral notes, spices and fine aromatic herbs resting on a base of vetiver, cedar, musk, vanilla and labdanumCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize100 ml
